title: BOTW 1
description: Music from Zelda Breath of the Wild
body:
5- Main Theme

11- Opening

13- The Towers Rise

blocks- The Beast

cat- Shiekah Tower

chirp- The Old Man Appears

far- Shrine Trial Start

mall- Shrine

mellohi- Shrine Battle

otherside- Highlands

pigstep- Stationary Guardian Battle

relic- The Temple of Time

stal- The Last King of Hyrule

strad- The Story of Calamity Ganon

wait- A King's Request

ward- Enter Hyrule

Please donate to AbleGamers to help "create opportunities that enable play for people with disabilities and improve their quality of life while prioritizing two core objectives: enabling people with disabilities to access video games with ease and empowering game creators and developers to design games with maximum accessibility".
